# Pucar · ON Court — design system

Pucar's design system for the ON Court product (Indian courts — Section 138, CNR, hearings; Kerala). Built on shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4, Radix-anchored tokens in OKLCH-safe hex, verified WCAG 2.2 AA in light and dark.

## Read first (the design law + the craft)
- **design-guidelines.md** — the LAW: sentence case only, brand teal rationed to primary/active/focus, status colours mean status, categorical palette for charts, AA floor, calibrated greys that survive bad monitors, generous spacing, never colour alone, calm/friendly tone.
- **screen-craft.md** — the CRAFT: spacing ladder + proximity rules, page scaffolds (form/list/detail/dashboard/empty), hierarchy & squint test, UX patterns (dialog vs sheet vs page, feedback, filtering, disclosure), the 5 screen states, citizen vs staff density, and the mandatory pre-done review pass. Generating ANY screen? Follow both.

## Foundations — tokens (source of truth: lib/tokens/tokens.ts → `pnpm tokens`)
- Surfaces/text: `background` `foreground` `card` `popover` (+ `-foreground`)
- Brand/neutral: `primary` (teal #007E7E) `secondary` `muted` `accent` (+ `-foreground`)
- Status fills: `destructive` `success` `warning` `info` (+ `-foreground`); chips: `success-muted` `warning-muted` `info-muted` (+ `-foreground`)
- Structure: `border` `input` `ring`; brand tint (non-text): `brand-accent`
- Data-viz (categorical, distinct hues): `chart-1` teal · `chart-2` blue · `chart-3` violet · `chart-4` amber · `chart-5` rose
- Sidebar: `sidebar` `sidebar-foreground` `sidebar-primary` `sidebar-accent` `sidebar-border` `sidebar-ring`
- Type scale (sentence case, weight ladder): `text-caption` `text-body-compact` `text-body` `text-title-s` `text-title` `text-title-l` `text-display-s` `text-display`
- Spacing 4/8 grid · radius 10px (`rounded-lg/md/…`) · elevation `shadow-raised/overlay/modal`
- Font: Helvetica Neue system stack (zero-download).

## Components & patterns (components/ui/, app/)
- Primitives: button, input, select, checkbox, radio-group, switch, slider, textarea, label, field (form anatomy: label above, caption hint, destructive+text error), button-group, card, table, tabs, dialog, sheet, drawer, popover, dropdown-menu, tooltip, alert, badge, avatar, progress, skeleton, spinner (in-context pending only — pages load with skeletons), empty (canonical empty state), sonner (toast), chart, breadcrumb, pagination, command, calendar, …
- Patterns: site-shell (app frame w/ sidebar + top bar + user block), status pill chips, share-of-docket, stat cards with signed deltas, case dashboard (app/dashboard), new-case form (app/settings).
- Live gallery: `/` renders every component against current tokens (the review surface).

## Install elsewhere (registry)
- `npx shadcn add https://<host>/r/pucar-theme.json`  → the tokens/theme
- `npx shadcn add https://<host>/r/<component>.json`  → ANY ui component, Pucar-themed (button, field, table, …) — internal deps auto-resolve to this registry
- `npx shadcn add https://<host>/r/<block>.json`  → dashboard, new-case, status-pill, site-shell, …

## Rules of thumb
Sentence case. Teal rationed. Status = meaning, charts = categorical. AA verified. Generous spacing, 40px targets. Never colour alone (pair with icon/arrow/label).
